# nuphirho blog

Technical writing by Christo Zietsman on software engineering, AI-assisted development, cybersecurity, and systems thinking.

## About the author

Christo Zietsman is a technologist with 20+ years of experience spanning mine seismology, antenna design expert systems, enterprise backup, and cybersecurity. He holds a Masters in Continuum Mechanics (Cum Laude, Stellenbosch University) and currently leads technology innovation at CyberSentriq.

## About this site

blog.nuphirho.dev is a technical blog focused on:

- AI-assisted engineering practices (BDD, mutation testing, verification layers)
- Security engineering and threat modelling
- Software architecture and process over technology
- Honest reflection on what works and what does not

Content is written in British English. Posts show reasoning, not just conclusions. AI assists with drafting; the thinking and decisions are the author's.

## Content

- All posts: https://blog.nuphirho.dev/
- RSS feed: https://blog.nuphirho.dev/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://blog.nuphirho.dev/sitemap.xml

## Machine-readable post format

Each post is available as plain Markdown (frontmatter stripped) at:

  https://blog.nuphirho.dev/[slug].md

Replace `[slug]` with the post slug from the post URL. The response is `text/markdown; charset=utf-8`.

## Contact

privacy@nuphirho.dev
